note: Eight short, original contemplative phrases — one per lunar phase. Read-only mirror surfaced in the Om Cipher panel. Living Profile is where evolving personal contemplation lives.

phases.0: I plant what I cannot yet see.
phases.1: I tend what has not yet grown.
phases.4: I stand in the light of what I built.
phases.5: I share what I have learned.
phases.6: I do less now, and allow more.
phases.7: I release what no longer serves the whole.
